title: Wapiti Designs Go-Long Gaiters Trail Running Shoe Gaiters for Running, Hiking, or Long Distance Backpacking
features: Machine Wash
Ultralight trail gaiters to keep dirt and debris out of your shoe
Double walled ankle design allows for more durability around areas your feet may cause wear
S/M fits US Women's 7-11, US Men's 6-9; L/XL fits US Women's 11.5-13, US Men's 9.5-13
Perfect for Trail Running, Hiking, or Backpacking the PCT, CDT, AT

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Purchased these gaiters for our hike through the Grand Canyon. Didn't install the velcro strap and it still worked wonders. My wife had the Outdoor Research version with a sole strap and was more frustrated due to that strap unlatching constantly....and this is half the price. I cant speak against its durability with abbrasions or water resistance. It feels as though it would be very helpful if caught in a rainstorm.

I should add I wore the L size over Salomon 4d Quest (size 11) with a lot of room to spare.

reviews.title: Secure but difficult to remove
reviews.text: Decent gaiters. Front lace hook is 'upside down'; you have to slide it in UNDER the lace. Good design for being secure, but let me tell you, it is a pain in the rear to take them off.

reviews.title: Lived up and exceeded expectations
reviews.text: We weren’t expecting as much snow on the trail today kept my upper sock area more warm and dry then without. I was really surprised. Super comfortable.

reviews.title: Gaiters a Hikers Best Friend
reviews.text: I purchased these gaiters for my Bug out Bag Gear. I am very happy with these gaiters! they seem to have good quality, as far as construction, and seem to be well made. It's a Hikers Find. I would Recommend these, and they are a little cheaper than Dirty Girl Gaiters. I am considering another purchase in the future, as I feel having more than one pair to change out the dirty ones in between laundering is a smart move. The patterns are limited and also color choices, but it's functionality is whats more important! I haven't put them on trail or hiking as of yet, but I intend to in the future!

reviews.title: Gaiters keep sand out of shoes
reviews.text: I super glued the velcro to the heel of my shoes as directed, secured my new gaiters and went on a multi-day hike, frequently in sand. The gaiters did a marvelous job of keeping the sand and debris out of my shoes. Also, they are packed really small to stash in my backpack when not in use. I would recommend these gaiters.

Imported

Adidas quality
Imported by adidas

reviews.title: WAY too tight over the foot.  NOT for Diabetics, IMHO!
reviews.text:
I've had these on for about an hour now, so I am sure they are not returnable. That's too bad, because an hour has shown me that they are very uncomfortable. I cannot imagine who would find them wearable. Maybe someone with abnormally narrow feet.

The VERY stretchy material they are made from makes them hard to get on. You MUST use a shoehorn, and even then, it is not easy. They also - unpleasantly - squeeze the foot. After an hour, my toes are getting cold from low circulation! Seriously! Plus, the material does not breathe well, despite it's "perforated" appearance. So my feet are hot and wet.

The laces are just decoration. It's the tight material that holds them on. Plus, the artsy-craftsy arch inset in the instep is an invitation to soiling underneath it, without giving much arch support.
Could these be knock-offs? I assumed the attractive price was because they are a discontinued color. Maybe they are just fakes!.

PS THESE ARE NOT FOR DIABETICS. There is too much restriction of circulation.

I was advised to get "caged" Ultraboosts...the ones that lace normally. (The "cage" is the plastic framework for the laces.) But I liked the color of these.

Big mistake.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 5 Running Shoes
description: Go further than ever before with the GEL-CONTEND 5 extra wide width men's running shoe from ASICS. Created to offer the stability required to help you go the distance this shoe offers a supportive fit thanks to an internal heel counter. Features include a removable sockliner Rearfoot GEL technology and an AMPLIFOAM midsole which ensure your foot remains cushioned every step of the way. The solid rubber outsole and stitch-down toe reinforcement also mean it has a high level of durability while the breathable athletic mesh means that your feet stay fresher for longer as you take on new challenges. Proudly sporting our classic logo on the side you can rest assured that the GEL-CONTEND 5 shoe will give you comfort and protection when you need it most. Weight: 10.25. Heel Height: 22mm. Forefoot Height: 12mm.

reviews.title: Best running shoe  yet!
reviews.text: I’ve tried a lot of shoes - Newtons, Brooks (Levitate), Hoka ( Clifton), Ons, Altras, Topos (Ultrafly), Mizunos (Hitogami), Adidas, etc. and these are the best. Most like the Hokas in terms of weight and comfort but with better arch.  While I still have my Brooks, Hokas, and Adidas in my shoe rotation these are the ones I use for my long runs. - context: 25 to 30 mile a week runner, 3 marathons, ~ 10 halfs, numerous 12 k and under distances.

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole
Power in Simplicity: The New Balance 680v6 running shoe for kids features a minimal leather and open mesh upper, offering flexible support and easy-breezy comfort
Modern Construction for an Outstanding Fit: The leather/mesh upper on these New Balance kids' running shoes features a stitched-down tip and foxing details to provide flexible support and durability
Soft Underfoot Cushioning: The ABZORB midsole absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, giving these kids' running shoes a comfortable feel that lasts all day
Designed for Support and Durability: These kids' performance shoes feature a strong rubber outsole to offer long-lasting durability, built to stand up to daily use and playground wear-and-tear
Available in a Range of Colors: From neutral tones to bold hues, these cushioned running shoes for kids are available in a range of shades to suit the style and color preferences of your little one

The shoes fit true to size, and they width is great. She has a normal foot, I wouldn't recommend them for a child with wide feet. They are comfortable to wear and look great. This particular style is great for young children due to the velcro. Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: New Balance Wide Widths are the best!

reviews.title: These run a size too small (Mens)
reviews.text: Received my new running shoes about 15 minutes ago from Amazon.  I was excited to use these shoes on a run and tried them on.  I have a narrow foot and wear an 11 in New Balance (based on 3 pairs of shoes), and every other brand except Salomon and Saucony that run small.  Well, these run small, really small.  My toe was touching the end of the shoe, and these were very tight and hard to get on (I have a narrow foot!).  These are lightweight, look good, and appear to be somewhat well made.  The soles look like they are cheaper foam, and don't really have a running shoe tread.  Not sure how long they would last, but at the under forty dollar price when marked down, not a bad deal.  I would expect to get at least 200 miles on pavement running out of these.

reviews.text:
If you're looking for shoes that fit as intended, look elsewhere.
The soles are fine, but the upper is rigid fabric. That's not the bad part. The problem is the heel cup is not a heel cup at all. It stops nearly an inch short of where it needs to be and it's flat at the back. It's not a heel cup. It's flat at the back. WTF!
example: size 9 soles; size 8 1/2" upper with half an inch removed at the heel creating immense pain at the heel.

reviews.title: Shoes arrived late deformed and with a snag in top material
reviews.text: Shoes arrived late and deformed sole stuck out about an inch behind shoe. There was also a snag in material on top of shoe very disappointed

reviews.title: Great Comfort
reviews.text: I put orthotics in this shoes. I walked around a amusement park with them and my feet did not hurt. They are very comfortable. I like that I do not need to tie them. I will buy them  again in a different color.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Feels natural and comfortable

reviews.title: Just what we were looking for
reviews.text: These fit wide feet perfectly!

title: New Balance Men's 410 V6 Trail Running Shoe
description:
Be off-road ready in the New Balance 410v6 men’s trail shoe. Featuring a durable AT Tread rubber outsole, this shoe is fit for any adventure. Made with a sleek upper, ACTEVA midsole technology and a cushioned NB Comfort Insert, the versatile men’s running shoe is designed to keep you comfortable and stylish before, during and after your hike.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
ACTEVA midsole cushioning delivers versatile, flexible support
AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities
Lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole provides lightweight cushioning
NB Comfort Insert offers additional cushioning
Synthetic/mesh upper

reviews.title: Sizing
reviews.text: Too narrow

reviews.title: Cheap quality
reviews.text: These are wimpy tennis shoes.  They probably wont' make it a year.  I judge the quality by picking up the shoe and twisting in my hands.  I can easily warp these shoes.  I have some Merrills and I absolutely can't bend them up.

reviews.title: Not the best looking shoe but the most comfortable!
reviews.text: Man my feet hurt. And because I wear the same shoes everyday all day they break down pretty quickly.  These are perfect.  The color isn't my absolute favorite BUT that was the color that was on sale. Besides I'm nearly 50 so I'm not out to impress anyone lol.  They fit my feet perfectly and  there is no better feeling of new shoes when your old shoes broke down! Just enough support.

reviews.title: Great Walking Shoe!
reviews.text: I got these for at home. I like wearing shoes inside. So they need to be clean. I got these, and they are comfy and see like they will last a long time. They should, if I only wear them in my house.

reviews.title: Good fit in a large size
reviews.text: I bought these shoes as a gift for my 25 year old son, who wears a size 16. I know from past experience that New Balance provides a good, consistent fit in their large sizes, and this pair did not disappoint. The fit was great and my son liked the color and style.

title: New Balance Men's FuelCell Rebel Tr V1 Running Shoe
description: Packed with the features you need for performance, the New Balance FuelCell Rebel TR men's running shoe provides the ultimate underfoot experience for athletes of any level. With FuelCell midsole foam and an ABZORB Dynamic Response System for impressive rebound, this shoe has the power to carry you through running, training, and everything in between. It's grounded in performance, but built for stand-out style.
features: 100% Textile
Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole
FitWeave Lite
Synthetic upper with no-sew overlays
ABZORB Dynamic Response System provides added rebound
Exposed TPU shank adds support without compromising flexibility
FuelCell foam delivers a propulsive feel to help drive you forward

reviews.title: Not recommended for you name brand sneaker wearers

I wear sz 8 in ladies so a 6.5 is what I selected in this male shoe

reviews.title: Love love them
reviews.text: They fit like a glove. Two days and my feet is in love.  I can't wait til I go for my run in them. Nicely made as well.

reviews.title: It's cheap for a reason
reviews.text: Not well constructed, zero support, cheaply made and cannot be used for any athletic activity. It's a for show and I'll be luckly if it  lasts 4 months as it's already wearing out.

reviews.title: Quality and Comfortable Shoe for All Activities
reviews.text: This shoe is very comfortable to walk long distances. If you're on your feet a lot I highly recommend this shoe. It provides good comfort and support. You can use this shoe for any daily activity.

reviews.title: Good indoor shoe
reviews.text: Good indoor shoe but may not last long walking on street or pavement. Shoe does not open up like a lace up shoe.  Shoe looks good on just hope the inner sole holds up and remains comfortable.

title: Avia Avi Factor Slip On Girls' Sneakers - Lightweight Tennis, Athletic, Running Shoes for Girls - Toddler, Little Kid, and Big Kid Sizes 11 to 6
features: Rubber sole
PERFORMANCE SNEAKERS FOR GIRLS - A sturdy, dependable everyday sneaker that provides ultimate durability for active kids. The lightweight, breathable mesh overlays create comfort and ventilation.

SLIP ON, NO TIE LACES ALTERNATIVE CLOSURE - Gore, bungee, or toggle lace closures with no tying makes an easy, fast on and off option for toddlers, preschoolers, and kids of all ages. The perfect camp, sports, everyday, or back to school shoes! Available in sizes toddler 10 to big kid 6.
COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.
COOL TODDLER & GIRLS SNEAKERS - In trendy, versatile colors, these running shoes go with everything in their wardrobes - and they stand out in the crowd!
NON-MARKING TPR SOLEPLATE - Kids will leave their mark on people, not on the ground or gym floor! The thick but light weight rubber sole holds up to everyday wear and play.

reviews.title: Great little athletic shoes
reviews.text: My daughter, age 5, wears a size 13(kid) and has a wide foot. These shoes fit nicely. I like that there isn't any velcro. Velcro never holds up well and everything gets stuck to it. These shoes are closer to the shoes that we'll be buying in the near future once my daughter masters tying laces. Highly recommend these shoes.

reviews.title: Pretty and comfortable but looked worn very quickly
reviews.text: My granddaughter loved these shoes - she loved the colors and the fit -  but they wore out in a matter of a few weeks.

reviews.title: True Size Fit
reviews.text: These girl's tennis shoes are so cute! They're also pretty comfortable. The slip-on feature is easy and the shoes stay on. Traction is good. They are true size fit. And they're very affordable.

reviews.title: Pretty
reviews.text:
They liked the rainbow sneakers. These sneakers were good. She could run in them without a problem.
These shoes are very nice. They were cute for my child. They thought they were comfortable. The fit was fine. They were able to use it for different situations. They were easy to put on and off. The quality seemed fine. They looked good on her. She liked them. The deal was fine. I would recommend them.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Fits as expected, pretty design and colors.  Comfortable,  well made, good brand.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 22 Running Shoes
description: The Gel-Cumulus 22 running shoe is the recommended choice for neutral runners who want a soft and flexible daily trainer with a great fit. This update features a one-piece superior mesh combined with a seamless 3D printing structure that balances support and comfort around the foot, giving you an excellent fit right away. Flytefoam midsole is softer than the previous version for comfortable riding. Under the heel where the foot hits for the first time the ground has been redesigned to better insulate the impact. This new heel design has deeper grooves on the forefoot and a softer midsole foam to give you a soft drive. A durable AHAR rubber sole has been placed in key contact areas to help the Gel-Cumulus 22 shoe withstand a ton of miles.
features: Made in USA or Imported
Rubber sole
Flytefoam Propel Technology In The Midsole Offers Excellent Bounce And Toe-Off

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe
reviews.text: Great fit & comfortable

reviews.title: Odd fit
reviews.text: I sized up and they are short in the toe box and run narrow  — I have a narrow foot and these usually run wide and long on me. An 8 always fit bit not in this shoe. I’m returning.

reviews.title: Not supportive
reviews.text: Absolutely no support.  I'm a bigger person but these shoes killed my feet.  I've generally had good luck with Asics but returned these

reviews.title: Omg shoes
reviews.text: This is the best shoe ever.  I’m glad I got mine before someone else got it!

reviews.title: Nice and light
reviews.text: Fit well and lightweight. We’ll see if they hold up over the summer runs. Good price, too. May order another pair for just walking around.

title: Reebok Men's Driftium Running Shoe
description:
Reebok was founded for one of the best reasons possible: athletes wanted to run faster. So in the 1890s, joseph william Foster made some of the first known running shoes with spikes in them. By 1895, he was in business making shoes by hand for top runners; and before long his fledgling company, j.W. Foster and sons, developed an international clientele of distinguished athletes.
